inline_comments.message: Should this be a req, or just some verbiage? From a validation perspective, the scripts will not be directly testing this. If the new metadata is used, the other tests that check the naming convention will exit. But there won't be a script explicitly testing that a non-conformant parameter is also included in the metadata section.
